description_long: This house features a two-story main structure with a brick exterior and a flat roof, complemented by an attached single-story section with a red-tiled gable roof. The main entrance is marked by a wooden door and a small patch of green lawn, while the side and rear areas are paved with concrete. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the brick facades, providing ample natural light. The attached section includes a garage with a white door and a trellis covered in greenery, adding a touch of nature to the urban setting. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and features a mix of hardscaped and landscaped elements. The overall design is practical and urban, with clear zones for entry, parking, and outdoor use.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, attached single-story garage with a red-tiled gable roof, and a mix of paved and green outdoor areas. Symmetrical windows, a wooden entry door, and a fenced perimeter define its urban character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a wooden door, two large windows, a small green lawn, and the flat-roofed two-story section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick facade, symmetrical windows, and the transition from the flat-roofed main section to the red-tiled gable roof of the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage with a red-tiled roof, paved backyard, and the back of the main house with additional windows and a fenced area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage door, trellis with greenery, and the paved walkway leading to the main house and entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no porch, set flush with the facade, adjacent to a small green lawn and paved walkway.
